markets.question: Spread: FK Dukla Praha (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Czechia Fortuna Liga game, scheduled for March 14 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "FK Dukla Praha" if FK Dukla Praha win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FK Jablonec".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on fortunaliga.cz. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FK Dukla Praha vs. FK Jablonec - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Czechia Fortuna Liga game, scheduled for March 14 at 10:00 AM ET.

markets.question: CR Vasco da Gama vs. Grêmio FBPA: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game between CR Vasco da Gama and Grêmio FBPA, scheduled for March 22 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if CR Vasco da Gama and Grêmio FBPA combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: CR Vasco da Gama vs. Grêmio FBPA: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game between CR Vasco da Gama and Grêmio FBPA, scheduled for March 22 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both CR Vasco da Gama and Grêmio FBPA each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).
